{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260324105146621EF248EE1B8B56769E"}"},"total":10358},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7132808888516379406","common":{"comment_type":21,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"太牛了，一口气就看完了，第一次看病娇文，说实话前面属实把我吓到了，男主是真狠，令我没想到的是第二卷，我以为会和第一卷一样，结果太出乎我的意料了，他们每个人都变了，都有和第一卷里截然不同的生活，我本以为我会不喜欢，可是没想到我竟然看下去了，我一直看的都是大女主，第一次看到这样的女主，有些地方我也不是那么喜欢，但是还是看下去了，没有一点不想看的感觉
作者文笔太好了，不看剧情都能把我看哭，真的好有画面感，还有就是，格局直接打开，很喜欢作者的题外话，也不知道怎么说，就是很喜欢，尤其是平行宇宙这个话题，让我很惊讶，我们现在的生活或许不尽人意，但是在平行时空的另一个我可能做出了不一样的选择，生活的很好，我们无法去改变什么，“我只能在我的维度里，祝另一个时空的我，一切安好顺遂。”","text_exts":[{"e":129,"s":126,"text":"大女主","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E5%A4%A7%E5%A5%B3%E4%B8%BB&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%2317743207068B56769E%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227132808888516379406%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227102714105307335721%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E5%A4%A7%E5%A5%B3%E4%B8%BB%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1660736554,"group_id":"7102714105307335721","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N3waGEkXJbaL3T1SgK/6WWJnGd10Hr6C4PHE9g8ANqQJ","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/ca1f5c2739884c67985dcf32af71dc8b~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776881125&x-signature=sJQ1BQswZOM6lQvbs7Uw6Tl4k7c%3D","user_id":"3276176884237966","user_name":"蒲( ｰ̀εｰ́ )"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3276176884237966","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7102714105307335721","book_info":{"abstract":"【重生+病娇偏执+治愈救赎+双向奔赴+先暗黑后撒糖】
排雷，前期男主略变态。不是爽文大女主。不要因此差评，谢谢。
宋清羡穿书了，穿到了和她同名的女配身上，附带一枚甩都甩不掉的病娇偏执反派，反派大佬疯狂痴恋宋清羡，为她生，为她死，为她哐哐撞大墙。
宋清羡可以神奇的看到陆南湛头上的数字，每当数字变成100后，他就会和宋清羡同归于尽。
为了活下去，宋清羡开始了漫漫拯救反派大佬之路。在经历了N次死亡重生后，她最终慢慢打开了陆南湛封闭的心门，给予了他真正的救赎与治愈。
先致郁再治愈，双向奔赴才是最甜的！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2o01e93def933097ef96cbffbcd8cd2c65~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"奶油鹿","author_id":"","book_id":"7102714105307335721","book_name":"穿书之病娇偏执反派大佬拯救计划","book_short_name":"见蝴蝶","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#501010","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"2.5万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":267,"name":"现言脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=267&name=现言脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":3,"name":"现代言情","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=3&name=现代言情&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":29,"name":"总裁","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=29&name=总裁&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":36,"name":"重生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=36&name=重生&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":369,"name":"反派","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=369&name=反派&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":380,"name":"病娇","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=380&name=病娇&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":382,"name":"穿书","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=382&name=穿书&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":473,"name":"豪门世家","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=473&name=豪门世家&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":476,"name":"双向奔赴","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=476&name=双向奔赴&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":520,"name":"大佬","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=520&name=大佬&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":524,"name":"双重生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=524&name=双重生&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":834,"name":"1v1","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=834&name=1v1&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":852,"name":"魂穿","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=852&name=魂穿&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7102761383044841987","read_count":"24353","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"200014"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.2","serial_count":"95","tags":"现言脑洞,现代言情,总裁,重生,穿越,反派,病娇,穿书,豪门世家,双向奔赴,大佬,双重生,1v1,魂穿","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/p2o01e93def933097ef96cbffbcd8cd2c65~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779504706&x-signature=rZnoFmga2nPGD4wVqHBZQAmRpqM%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"2546083072836680","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"2.1326409e+07"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260324105146621EF248EE1B8B56769E"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读6小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":14,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":21326,"reply_count":2,"show_pv":2998},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7435531423182914328","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"作者文笔超好幽默诙谐又富有深意，真的很好看，也不算很长，剧情看的波荡起伏，埋有伏笔，每个人都在成长，女主也在努力学着救赎男主。这本书里作者也写了人站在不同角度所看到的问题和感想是有所不同的，让人看了不由深思和感慨。每个人都有独属于自己的结局，或有遗憾，但两条不相交的平行线终是相交了，让他们有情人终成眷属。（作者大大超棒，我超爱）"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1731224191,"group_id":"7102714105307335721","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"新手作家，主要喜欢言情","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N6AMC2mB0uhE2qtZ7fZe1i69ttrKGADhV4Ynx7jlaX7v","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/76bb063868864421b765f3f2a45ed05e~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776880691&x-signature=6ni3YjVMC1Vou3AtGW6bjoCfp3g%3D","user_id":"4432870882683367","user_name":"卿安儿"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"4432870882683367","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1752076333,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#E1DDFF","can_worn":false,"id":5,"name":"前排催更","small_url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/dda89d247c75fa9dfdf08a80bd508401","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/b9a497dac48a9ee6b81051a70c630d0f"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7102714105307335721","book_info":{"abstract":"【重生+病娇偏执+治愈救赎+双向奔赴+先暗黑后撒糖】
